action_set_definitions.name: get_student_context
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the student's profile (affinities), fatigue levels, and current session history. Essential for initial state discovery.

student_id.description: The unique identifier for the student.

action_set_definitions.name: search_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the content inventory for high-quality learning objects within a specific curriculum node.

category.description: The curriculum node to search (e.g., 'Integer Operations' or 'Algebraic').

min_quality_score.description: The minimum quality threshold (0.0 to 1.0) to filter out low-quality items.

exclude_deprecated.description: If true, filters out content marked as deprecated or inactive.

action_set_definitions.name: recommend_content
action_set_definitions.description: The primary interaction tool. Recommends a specific learning object to the student. Updates the environment state and returns the student's performance observation.

item_id.description: The ID of the learning object to serve.

action_set_definitions.name: get_item_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed metadata for a list of item IDs to check for near-duplicates or specific prerequisite tags.

state_description.user_profile: A map of content categories to affinity scores (0.0 to 1.0) representing the current user's preferences.
state_description.content_inventory: A list of available content items currently in the system's buffer, including their metadata (ID, category, quality score).
state_description.session_history: A list of item IDs already shown to the user in this session to manage fatigue and repetition.
state_description.fatigue_levels: A counter mapping categories to the number of times they've been recently shown; affects the probability of engagement.
